revision.comment: 「[[Template:Category:年別のカテゴリ/下位]]」の保護設定を変更しました: [[WP:HRT|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]] ([編集=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限) [移動=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限))
revision.text: {| id="toc" class="toccolours" border="1" cellpadding="4" style="border-collapse:collapse;border-style:solid;border-width:1px; {{#switch:{{{align|}}} |left=clear:left;float:left;margin-right:1.0em; |right=clear:right;float:right;margin-left:1.0em; |center=margin:1.0em auto; |none=margin:1.0em 0; |#default=margin:1.0em;}}" |class="hlist" style="padding-left:0.5em;text-align:center;padding-right:0.5em;"| * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 6}}年{{{1}}} {{{transition suffix|}}}|←]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年]] * '''{{{y|}}}年''' * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +1}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +5}}年]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 6}}年{{{1}}}|→]] |}<noinclude> {{DEFAULTSORT:ねんへつのかてこり}} [[Category:年別カテゴリページ用テンプレート]] </noinclude>

{| id="toc" class="toccolours" border="1" cellpadding="4" style="border-collapse:collapse;border-style:solid;border-width:1px; {{#switch:{{{align|}}} |left=clear:left;float:left;margin-right:1.0em; |right=clear:right;float:right;margin-left:1.0em; |center=margin:1.0em auto; |none=margin:1.0em 0; |#default=margin:1.0em;}}" |class="hlist" style="padding-left:0.5em;text-align:center;padding-right:0.5em;"| * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 6}}年{{{1}}} {{{transition suffix|}}}|←]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年]] * '''{{{y|}}}年''' * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +1}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +5}}年]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 6}}年{{{1}}}|→]] |}<noinclude> {{DEFAULTSORT:ねんへつのかてこり}} [[Category:年別カテゴリページ用テンプレート]] </noinclude>

{| id="toc" class="toccolours" border="1" cellpadding="4" style="border-collapse:collapse;border-style:solid;border-width:1px; {{#switch:{{{align|}}} |left=clear:left;float:left;margin-right:1.0em; |right=clear:right;float:right;margin-left:1.0em; |center=margin:1.0em auto; |none=margin:1.0em 0; |#default=margin:1.0em;}}" |class="hlist" style="padding-left:0.5em;text-align:center;padding-right:0.5em;"| * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 6}}年{{{1}}} {{{transition suffix|}}}|←]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年]] * '''{{{y|}}}年''' * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +1}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +5}}年]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 6}}年{{{1}}}|→]] |}<noinclude> {{DEFAULTSORT:ねんへつのかてこり}} [[Category:年別カテゴリページ用テンプレート]] [[Category:jawiki imported templates from 2025-05-27]] [[ja:Template:Category:年別のカテゴリ/下位]] </nowiki>

{| id="toc" class="toccolours" border="1" cellpadding="4" style="border-collapse:collapse;border-style:solid;border-width:1px; {{#switch:{{{align|}}} |left=clear:left;float:left;margin-right:1.0em; |right=clear:right;float:right;margin-left:1.0em; |center=margin:1.0em auto; |none=margin:1.0em 0; |#default=margin:1.0em;}}" |class="hlist" style="padding-left:0.5em;text-align:center;padding-right:0.5em;"| * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 6}}年{{{1}}} {{{transition suffix|}}}|←]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年]] * '''{{{y|}}}年''' * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +1}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +5}}年]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 6}}年{{{1}}}|→]] |}<noinclude> {{DEFAULTSORT:ねんへつのかてこり}} [[Category:年別カテゴリページ用テンプレート]] [[Category:jawiki imported templates from 2025-05-27]] [[ja:Template:Category:年別のカテゴリ/下位]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
{| id="toc" class="toccolours" border="1" cellpadding="4" style="border-collapse:collapse;border-style:solid;border-width:1px; {{#switch:{{{align|}}} |left=clear:left;float:left;margin-right:1.0em; |right=clear:right;float:right;margin-left:1.0em; |center=margin:1.0em auto; |none=margin:1.0em 0; |#default=margin:1.0em;}}" |class="hlist" style="padding-left:0.5em;text-align:center;padding-right:0.5em;"| * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 6}}年{{{1}}} {{{transition suffix|}}}|←]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年]] * '''{{{y|}}}年''' * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +1}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +5}}年]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 6}}年{{{1}}}|→]] |}<noinclude> {{citation needed|ねんへつのかてこり}} [[Category:年別カテゴリページ用テンプレート]] [[Category:jawiki imported templates from 2025-05-27]] [[ja:Template:Category:年別のカテゴリ/下位]]
[[Category:jawiki imported templates from 2025-05-27]] [[ja:Template:Category:年別のカテゴリ/下位]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
{| id="toc" class="toccolours" border="1" cellpadding="4" style="border-collapse:collapse;border-style:solid;border-width:1px; {{#switch:{{{align|}}} |left=clear:left;float:left;margin-right:1.0em; |right=clear:right;float:right;margin-left:1.0em; |center=margin:1.0em auto; |none=margin:1.0em 0; |#default=margin:1.0em;}}" |class="hlist" style="padding-left:0.5em;text-align:center;padding-right:0.5em;"| * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 6}}年{{{1}}} {{{transition suffix|}}}|←]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年]] * '''{{{y|}}}年''' * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +1}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +5}}年]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 6}}年{{{1}}}|→]] |}<noinclude> {{citation needed|ねんへつのかてこり}} [[Category:年別カテゴリページ用テンプレート]] [[Category:jawiki imported templates from 2025-05-27]] [[ja:Template:Category:年別のカテゴリ/下位]]
[[Category:jawiki imported templates from 2025-05-27]] [[ja:Template:Category:年別のカテゴリ/下位]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.text:
{| id="toc" class="toccolours" border="1" cellpadding="4" style="border-collapse:collapse;border-style:solid;border-width:1px; {{#switch:{{{align|}}} |left=clear:left;float:left;margin-right:1.0em; |right=clear:right;float:right;margin-left:1.0em; |center=margin:1.0em auto; |none=margin:1.0em 0; |#default=margin:1.0em;}}" |class="hlist" style="padding-left:0.5em;text-align:center;padding-right:0.5em;"| * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 6}}年{{{1}}} {{{transition suffix|}}}|←]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年]] * '''{{{y|}}}年''' * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +1}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +5}}年]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 6}}年{{{1}}}|→]] |}<noinclude> {{citation needed|ねんへつのかてこり}} [[Category:年別カテゴリページ用テンプレート]] [[Category:jawiki imported templates from 2025-05-27]] [[ja:Template:Category:年別のカテゴリ/下位]]

revision.comment: Bot: undo wikidata additions from past 2 hours
revision.text:
{| id="toc" class="toccolours" border="1" cellpadding="4" style="border-collapse:collapse;border-style:solid;border-width:1px; {{#switch:{{{align|}}} |left=clear:left;float:left;margin-right:1.0em; |right=clear:right;float:right;margin-left:1.0em; |center=margin:1.0em auto; |none=margin:1.0em 0; |#default=margin:1.0em;}}" |class="hlist" style="padding-left:0.5em;text-align:center;padding-right:0.5em;"| * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 6}}年{{{1}}} {{{transition suffix|}}}|←]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年]] * '''{{{y|}}}年''' * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +1}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +5}}年]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 6}}年{{{1}}}|→]] |}<noinclude> {{citation needed|ねんへつのかてこり}} [[Category:年別カテゴリページ用テンプレート]] [[Category:jawiki imported templates from 2025-05-27]] [[ja:Template:Category:年別のカテゴリ/下位]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{| id="toc" class="toccolours" border="1" cellpadding="4" style="border-collapse:collapse;border-style:solid;border-width:1px; {{#switch:{{{align|}}} |left=clear:left;float:left;margin-right:1.0em; |right=clear:right;float:right;margin-left:1.0em; |center=margin:1.0em auto; |none=margin:1.0em 0; |#default=margin:1.0em;}}" |class="hlist" style="padding-left:0.5em;text-align:center;padding-right:0.5em;"| * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 6}}年{{{1}}} {{{transition suffix|}}}|←]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年]] * '''{{{y|}}}年''' * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +1}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +5}}年]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 6}}年{{{1}}}|→]] |}<noinclude> {{citation needed|ねんへつのかてこり}} [[Category:年別カテゴリページ用テンプレート]] [[Category:jawiki imported templates from 2025-05-27]] [[ja:Template:Category:年別のカテゴリ/下位]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{| id="toc" class="toccolours" border="1" cellpadding="4" style="border-collapse:collapse;border-style:solid;border-width:1px; {{#switch:{{{align|}}} |left=clear:left;float:left;margin-right:1.0em; |right=clear:right;float:right;margin-left:1.0em; |center=margin:1.0em auto; |none=margin:1.0em 0; |#default=margin:1.0em;}}" |class="hlist" style="padding-left:0.5em;text-align:center;padding-right:0.5em;"| * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 6}}年{{{1}}} {{{transition suffix|}}}|←]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年]] * '''{{{y|}}}年''' * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +1}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +5}}年]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 6}}年{{{1}}}|→]] |}<noinclude> {{citation needed|ねんへつのかてこり}} [[Category:年別カテゴリページ用テンプレート]] [[Category:jawiki imported templates from 2025-05-27]] [[ja:Template:Category:年別のカテゴリ/下位]]

</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{| id="toc" class="toccolours" border="1" cellpadding="4" style="border-collapse:collapse;border-style:solid;border-width:1px; {{#switch:{{{align|}}} |left=clear:left;float:left;margin-right:1.0em; |right=clear:right;float:right;margin-left:1.0em; |center=margin:1.0em auto; |none=margin:1.0em 0; |#default=margin:1.0em;}}" |class="hlist" style="padding-left:0.5em;text-align:center;padding-right:0.5em;"| * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 6}}年{{{1}}} {{{transition suffix|}}}|←]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年]] * '''{{{y|}}}年''' * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +1}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +5}}年]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 6}}年{{{1}}}|→]] |}<noinclude> {{citation needed|ねんへつのかてこり}} [[Category:年別カテゴリページ用テンプレート]] [[Category:jawiki imported templates from 2025-05-27]] [[ja:Template:Category:年別のカテゴリ/下位]]

</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{| id="toc" class="toccolours" border="1" cellpadding="4" style="border-collapse:collapse;border-style:solid;border-width:1px; {{#switch:{{{align|}}} |left=clear:left;float:left;margin-right:1.0em; |right=clear:right;float:right;margin-left:1.0em; |center=margin:1.0em auto; |none=margin:1.0em 0; |#default=margin:1.0em;}}" |class="hlist" style="padding-left:0.5em;text-align:center;padding-right:0.5em;"| * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 6}}年{{{1}}} {{{transition suffix|}}}|←]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年]] * '''{{{y|}}}年''' * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +1}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +5}}年]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 6}}年{{{1}}}|→]] |}<noinclude> {{citation needed|ねんへつのかてこり}} [[Category:年別カテゴリページ用テンプレート]] [[Category:jawiki imported templates from 2025-05-27]] [[ja:Template:Category:年別のカテゴリ/下位]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category%3A%E5%B9%B4%E5%88%A5%E3%81%AE%E3%82%AB%E3%83%86%E3%82%B4%E3%83%AA%2F%E4%B8%8B%E4%BD%8D here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category%3A%E5%B9%B4%E5%88%A5%E3%81%AE%E3%82%AB%E3%83%86%E3%82%B4%E3%83%AA%2F%E4%B8%8B%E4%BD%8D for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {| id="toc" class="toccolours" border="1" cellpadding="4" style="border-collapse:collapse;border-style:solid;border-width:1px; {{#switch:{{{align|}}} |left=clear:left;float:left;margin-right:1.0em; |right=clear:right;float:right;margin-left:1.0em; |center=margin:1.0em auto; |none=margin:1.0em 0; |#default=margin:1.0em;}}" |class="hlist" style="padding-left:0.5em;text-align:center;padding-right:0.5em;"| * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 6}}年{{{1}}} {{{transition suffix|}}}|←]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 5}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} - 1}}年]] * '''{{{y|}}}年''' * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 1}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +1}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 2}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +2}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 3}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +3}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 4}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +4}}年]] * [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 5}}年{{{1}}}|{{#expr: {{{y|}}} +5}}年]] [[:Category:{{#expr: {{{y|}}} + 6}}年{{{1}}}|→]] |}<noinclude> {{citation needed|ねんへつのかてこり}} [[Category:年別カテゴリページ用テンプレート]] [[Category:jawiki imported templates from 2025-05-27]] [[ja:Template:Category:年別のカテゴリ/下位]]
[[Category:jawiki imported templates from 2025-05-27]] [[ja:Template:Category:年別のカテゴリ/下位]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
